creator: pavelivolkov@googlemail.com
text:
Hello.
Changing the way the spread of the source distribution will be done
with the work on "ports/155908: [PATCH] database/sqlite3: use
sqlite3-autoconf instead of the deprecated sqlite3-src".
Thanks.

On Tue, May 1, 2012 at 9:10 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
>
> Maintainer of databases/sqlite3,
>
> Please note that PR ports/167493 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =C2=A0 =C2=A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/167493
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
